zh.Lorkeren, East Flanders, Belgium: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫
zh.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Pontrohart於大約1205年出生在英國時，她的父親Guillaume 1er De Berghes24歲，母親Elisabeth De Woomezelle36歲。她和Guillaume de Béthune III至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1278年1月19日享年74歲。

zh-hans.Lorkeren, East Flanders, Belgium: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫
zh-hans.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Pontrohart于大约1205年出生在英国时，她的父亲Guillaume 1er De Berghes24岁，母亲Elisabeth De Woomezelle36岁。她和Guillaume de Béthune III至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1278年1月19日享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Pontrohart was born about 1205, in England, her father, Guillaume 1er De Berghes, was 24 and her mother, Elisabeth De Woomezelle, was 36. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Guillaume de Béthune III. She died on 19 January 1278, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Pontrohart est née environ 1205, à Angleterre, son père, Guillaume 1er De Berghes, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth De Woomezelle, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Guillaume de Béthune III. Elle est décédée le 19 janvier 1278, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Pontrohart um 1205 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume 1er De Berghes 24 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth De Woomezelle 36. Sie hatte mit Guillaume de Béthune III mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Januar 1278 im Alter von 74 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Pontrohart è nata il circa 1205 nel England, sua padre, Guillaume 1er De Berghes, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth De Woomezelle, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Guillaume de Béthune III. Morì il 19 gennaio 1278, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.Lorkeren, East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレン
ja.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウン
ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Pontrohartが約1205年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Guillaume 1er De Berghesは24歳，母Elisabeth De Woomezelleは36歳であった。彼女はGuillaume de Béthune IIIとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1278年1月19日に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Pontrohart(이)가 대략 1205년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume 1er De Berghes(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth De Woomezelle(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume de Béthune III(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 1월 19일 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Pontrohart nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Guillaume 1er De Berghes, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth De Woomezelle, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Guillaume de Béthune III. Ela faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1278, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de Pontrohart родилась около 1205 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Guillaume 1er De Berghes было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth De Woomezelle, 36. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Guillaume de Béthune III. Она умерла 19 января 1278 г. в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de Pontrohart nació aproximadamente 1205, en Inglaterra, su papá, Guillaume 1er De Berghes, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elisabeth De Woomezelle, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Guillaume de Béthune III. Murió el 19 de enero de 1278, a la edad de 74 años.
